revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-1-050

no English term

The seaward end of a pier or jetty.


Note: The term pierhead is applied to the end of a pier used as a landing place for passengers.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Seaward pierhead}}
